languages.text: {n}Эоганн бережно берет его руку в свою. Он склоняется ближе и что-то шепчет, после чего отстраняется:{/n} "Пора. Ты не всегда был прав, как и я, но ты никогда не ошибался в тех вещах, которые действительно имеют значение. Прости и прощай, дражайший коллега".

{n}Eogunn takes Nuncius's hand gently in his own. He leans closer and whispers something, then pulls away:{/n} "It's time. You were not always right, and neither was I, but you were never wrong about the things that truly matter. Forgive me, and farewell, dearest colleague."
languages.original_text: {n}Эоганн бережно берет его руку в свою. Он склоняется ближе и что-то шепчет, после чего отстраняется:{/n} "Пора. Ты не всегда был прав, как и я, но ты никогда не ошибался в тех вещах, которые действительно имеют значение. Прости и прощай, дражайший коллега".

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn takes Nuncius's hand gently in his own. He leans closer and whispers something, then pulls away:{/n} "It's time. You were not always right, and neither was I, but you were never wrong about the things that truly matter. Forgive me, and farewell, dearest colleague."

{n}Eogunn takes Nuncius's hand gently in his own. He leans closer and whispers something, then pulls away:{/n} "It's time. You were not always right, and neither was I, but you were never wrong about the things that truly matter. Forgive me, and farewell, dearest colleague."

{n}Eogunn takes Nuncius's hand gently in his own. He leans closer and whispers something, then pulls away:{/n} "It's time. You were not always right, and neither was I, but you were never wrong about the things that truly matter. Forgive me, and farewell, dearest colleague."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn toma suavemente la mano de Nuncius, se inclina hacia él y le susurra algo al oído; luego se retira:{/n} «Es la hora. No siempre tenías la razón, como tampoco yo, pero nunca te equivocabas con las cosas que de verdad importaban. Perdóname y descansa en paz, estimado colega».
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn takes Nuncius's hand gently in his own. He leans closer and whispers something, then pulls away:{/n} "It's time. You were not always right, and neither was I, but you were never wrong about the things that truly matter. Forgive me, and farewell, dearest colleague."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn toma suavemente la mano de Nuncius, se inclina hacia él y le susurra algo al oído; luego se retira:{/n} «Es la hora. No siempre tenías la razón, como tampoco yo, pero nunca te equivocabas con las cosas que de verdad importaban. Perdóname y descansa en paz, estimado colega».

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡轻轻握住努恩修斯的手，俯身低语了几句，然后退开：{/n}“该结束了。你并非总是对的，我也一样。但在真正重要的事情上，你从没出过差错。原谅我，再会了，我最亲爱的同僚。”
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn takes Nuncius's hand gently in his own. He leans closer and whispers something, then pulls away:{/n} "It's time. You were not always right, and neither was I, but you were never wrong about the things that truly matter. Forgive me, and farewell, dearest colleague."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡轻轻握住努恩修斯的手，俯身低语了几句，然后退开：{/n}“该结束了。你并非总是对的，我也一样。但在真正重要的事情上，你从没出过差错。原谅我，再会了，我最亲爱的同僚。”

languages.text: {n}Eogunn prend doucement la main de Nuncius dans la sienne, puis se penche vers lui et murmure quelque chose avant de se relever.{/n} « Il est temps. Tu n'as pas toujours eu raison et moi non plus, mais tu ne t'es jamais trompé sur ce qui comptait réellement. Pardon, et adieu, mon très cher collègue. »
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn takes Nuncius's hand gently in his own. He leans closer and whispers something, then pulls away:{/n} "It's time. You were not always right, and neither was I, but you were never wrong about the things that truly matter. Forgive me, and farewell, dearest colleague."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn prend doucement la main de Nuncius dans la sienne, puis se penche vers lui et murmure quelque chose avant de se relever.{/n} « Il est temps. Tu n'as pas toujours eu raison et moi non plus, mais tu ne t'es jamais trompé sur ce qui comptait réellement. Pardon, et adieu, mon très cher collègue. »

languages.text: {n}Eogunn, Nuncius'un elini nazikçe kendi ellerinin arasına alıyor. Yaklaşıyor ve bir şeyler fısıldıyor, sonra geri çekiliyor.{/n} "Vakit geldi. Hep haklı değildin, ben de değildim ama gerçekten önemli olan konularda asla yanılmadın. Beni affet. Hoşça kal pek değerli meslektaşım."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn takes Nuncius's hand gently in his own. He leans closer and whispers something, then pulls away:{/n} "It's time. You were not always right, and neither was I, but you were never wrong about the things that truly matter. Forgive me, and farewell, dearest colleague."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn, Nuncius'un elini nazikçe kendi ellerinin arasına alıyor. Yaklaşıyor ve bir şeyler fısıldıyor, sonra geri çekiliyor.{/n} "Vakit geldi. Hep haklı değildin, ben de değildim ama gerçekten önemli olan konularda asla yanılmadın. Beni affet. Hoşça kal pek değerli meslektaşım."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn legt Nuncius' Hand sanft in seine. Er flüstert ihm etwas zu und zieht seine Hand zurück.{/n} "Es wird Zeit. Ihr hattet nicht immer recht, genau wie ich, aber Ihr habt Euch nie geirrt, was die Dinge angeht, die wirklich zählen. Vergebt mir und lebt wohl, geschätzter Kollege."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn takes Nuncius's hand gently in his own. He leans closer and whispers something, then pulls away:{/n} "It's time. You were not always right, and neither was I, but you were never wrong about the things that truly matter. Forgive me, and farewell, dearest colleague."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn legt Nuncius' Hand sanft in seine. Er flüstert ihm etwas zu und zieht seine Hand zurück.{/n} "Es wird Zeit. Ihr hattet nicht immer recht, genau wie ich, aber Ihr habt Euch nie geirrt, was die Dinge angeht, die wirklich zählen. Vergebt mir und lebt wohl, geschätzter Kollege."

languages.text: {n}エオガンはヌンキウスの手を、そっと自らの手に取る。彼は身を寄せて何かをささやき、それから身を離す。{/n}「時間です。あなたが常に正しかったわけではなく、私もそうではなかった。しかし、真に重要なことについて、あなたが間違ったことは一度もありませんでした。許してください。そして、さようなら、親愛なる同僚」
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn takes Nuncius's hand gently in his own. He leans closer and whispers something, then pulls away:{/n} "It's time. You were not always right, and neither was I, but you were never wrong about the things that truly matter. Forgive me, and farewell, dearest colleague."
